hero.title: Welcome to ITIC CRE
hero.description: The platform to track your internship and work-study applications. Progress in your career search with confidence.

features.title: Everything to succeed in your applications

item1.title: Real-time tracking
item1.desc: Track the status of each of your applications at any time.

item2.title: Advisor Space
item2.desc: Collaborate closely with your academic advisors.

item3.title: Centralized Documents
item3.desc: Manage your CVs, cover letters and contracts in one secure place.

parametres.title: Settings
parametres.description: Manage your preferences and account security.

cta.warning_text: This platform is a candidate tracking tool reserved for ITIC Paris students.

login.title: Login to your space
login.subtitle: Access your account securely.
login.hero_description: A single entry point to track internships, applications, follow-ups and exchanges with ITIC Paris advisors.
login.connexion_subtitle: Log in to your ITIC Paris space.
login.email_not_verified: Your email address has not been verified.
login.click_to_activate: Click here to activate your account.

register.title: Create your account
register.subtitle: Sign up to access the platform.
register.hero_description: Create your account and access all the tools to track your applications, internships and exchanges with your advisors.
register.register_subtitle: Fill in the form to get started.
register.first_name_min: First name must be at least 2 characters.
register.last_name_min: Last name must be at least 2 characters.
register.success_created: Account created! A verification email has been sent.
register.terms_required: You must accept the terms of service.
register.privacy_required: You must accept the privacy policy.

reset_password.title: Forgot password?
reset_password.subtitle: Enter your email address to receive a reset code.
reset_password.subtitle_step2: Enter the reset code and your new password.
reset_password.success_email_sent: A reset code has been sent to your email address.
reset_password.success_password_reset: Your password has been successfully reset!

verify_email.title: Verify your account
verify_email.subtitle: Enter the 6-digit OTP code sent to your email address (valid for 10 minutes).
verify_email.success_verified: Your account has been successfully verified! You can now log in.
verify_email.error_invalid_otp: The verification code is invalid or has expired.
verify_email.error_enter_email: Please enter an email address to resend the code.
verify_email.success_code_sent: A new verification code has been sent by email.
verify_email.email_invalid: Please enter a valid email address.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.introduction: Welcome to ITIC CRE. By using our platform, you accept these terms of service.

contact.title: Contact
contact.content: For any questions, please contact us at contact@itic-cre.fr.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.introduction: At ITIC CRE, protecting your personal data is our absolute priority.

contact.title: Contact DPO
contact.content: For any questions relative to your data, contact dpo@itic-cre.fr.
